# Harshal Dasani

> Business Head at INVasset PMS & AIF (Mumbai). Markets professional and writer. CFA candidate, CA Level II cleared. Featured in 1,000+ media features across 150+ publications in 8 languages. Topics: Indian equity markets, commodities, macros, geopolitics.

## Primary pages

- [About, Harshal Dasani](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/): personal page with bio, stats and links to social channels.
- [Media Features Tracker](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/tracker/): live searchable database of every article, interview and quote across 150+ publications.
- [Markets with Harshal - Blog](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/blog/): long-form notes on stock markets, commodities, macros and geopolitics.
- [Tools](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/tools/): free calculators - SIP, returns / CAGR / XIRR, capital-gains tax, and an oil-to-India impact estimator.

## Blog posts

- [The RBI's June 2026 pause that ends the easing cycle](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/blog/posts/rbi-mpc-june-2026-rate-pause/)
- [The Oil Shock and India: crude, the rupee and inflation](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/blog/posts/crude-oil-india-markets-rupee-inflation/)
- [Indian IT Stocks: what is actually breaking](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/blog/posts/indian-it-stocks-whats-breaking/)
- [The 2026 Iran war explained](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/blog/posts/iran-israel-us-war-2026-explained/)
